name: sleeptimegrt-plugins
description: Custom Claude Code plugins by SleepTimeGRT — agent orchestration, developer tooling, and platform-specific skills

plugins.name: process-todos
plugins.description: 3-tier agent orchestration for sequential todo processing — reads todo tickets, spawns worker agents, manages git worktrees, and handles handoffs automatically. Includes todo-creator skill for generating structured todos from natural language.

plugins.name: toss-miniapp
plugins.description: 토스 미니앱(Apps in Toss) 개발 가이드 — 온보딩, 디자인, 개발, 결제, 광고, 배포까지 전체 개발 라이프사이클을 지원하는 스킬 모음
